<!-- generated by src/_recgen.test.js -->
# eGeez — recording script

Everything a voice talent records. The app is drop-in: each clip lights up the
moment its file exists; missing clips fall back to a synth tone and never block.

**Export:** MONO mp3, 32 kbps, 44.1 kHz. Letters ~1s, words ~1-2s.
**Folders:** letters -> `public/audio/fidel/letters/`, words -> `public/audio/fidel/words/`, prompts -> `public/audio/fidel/prompts/`.
Tigrinya-only letters that differ from Amharic go under `letters/ti/` (see audioEngine override); everything shared can live in the base folder.

## Amharic (am) — letters

231 letters. File → `public/audio/fidel/letters/<file>.mp3`. Say the letter's sound, warm and slow.

## Tigrinya (ti) — words

32 words to record (words tagged "no audio" are skipped). File → `public/audio/fidel/words/<latin>.mp3`. Say the whole word naturally.

## Spoken prompts (English, both packs)

File -> `public/audio/fidel/prompts/<key>.mp3`. Warm, slow, to a 4-year-old.

| File | Say |
|---|---|
| `prompts/whichLetter.mp3` | Which letter makes this sound? |
| `prompts/buildWord.mp3` | Tap the letters in order to build the word. |
| `prompts/tapPicture.mp3` | Listen to the word, then tap its picture. |
| `prompts/whichGlyph.mp3` | Which letter writes this word? |
| `prompts/tapWords.mp3` | Tap any word to hear it. Tap the speaker to hear the page. |
| `prompts/traceLetter.mp3` | Listen, then trace the letter with your finger. |
| `prompts/warmupStart.mp3` | Let us warm up with the letters you know! |
| `prompts/placementStart.mp3` | Show me the letters you already know! |
